_meta.name: IT Job Designation Ontology
_meta.description: A comprehensive ontology of IT industry job designations for use in NLP-based extractors and matchers. Modelled after the MIND Tech Skills Ontology structure.

designations.name: Mobile Engineer
impliesResponsibilities: Native or cross-platform mobile app development

designations.name: Director of Engineering
impliesResponsibilities: Roadmap alignment with product and business

seniority_prefix_patterns.description: Common seniority-level prefixes to strip or tag when normalising designations in an extractor

normalization_rules.description: Rules for a Java extractor to normalise raw designation strings to canonical names
